summary: Tested Hubtel Checkout payment integration for card purchase and upgrade. Backend APIs working correctly (14/14 tests passed). Frontend payment pages (PaymentSuccessPage, PaymentCancelledPage) display correctly in English. ClientDashboard has checkout redirect logic implemented correctly.

integration_issues.issue: The 'card' field in /api/clients/me response is null even though client has card_type='silver'. This prevents the My Card section with upgrade options from displaying.
integration_issues.note: This is a data/API issue, not related to Hubtel Checkout feature

action_items: Fix /api/clients/me endpoint to return card object when client has card_type (currently returns null)

success_rate.frontend: 90% (payment pages work, dashboard card section has data issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Hubtel Checkout integration tested. Backend endpoints /api/payments/card/initiate, /api/payments/card/upgrade, and /api/payments/verify-checkout/{ref} all working correctly. In test mode (PAYMENT_TEST_MODE=false in .env but Hubtel not fully configured), APIs return use_checkout=False with test_mode=True. Frontend PaymentSuccessPage and PaymentCancelledPage display correctly in English.

card_purchase_initiate.validation: Invalid card type returns 400, non-existent client returns 404, active client cannot purchase another card

card_upgrade_initiate.validation: Downgrade not allowed, client without active card cannot upgrade

verify_checkout.statuses: completed, pending, checkout_initiated, processing, failed, not_found

payment_success_page.features: Auto-retry for pending payments, displays card info on success

mocked_api.note: Hubtel Checkout API is real but in test mode returns mock responses
